ComfyPencilStudio.description: Open a layered drawing studio, paint directly in ComfyUI, and output the current composite, alpha, and material support maps.

document_name.name: Document Name
document_name.tooltip: Visible title for the saved painting document.

document_id.name: Document Id
document_id.tooltip: Internal saved document reference managed by the studio.

revision.name: Revision
revision.tooltip: Internal revision value used to invalidate cached execution when the painting changes.

run_token.name: Run Token
run_token.tooltip: Internal cache-buster used when the studio queues manual or timed background runs.

split_prompt.name: Split Prompt
split_prompt.tooltip: Prompt text stored on the node and edited from the split-view control dock.

canvas_width.name: Canvas Width
canvas_width.tooltip: Pixel width of the painting surface.

canvas_height.name: Canvas Height
canvas_height.tooltip: Pixel height of the painting surface.

background_mode.name: Background Mode
background_mode.tooltip: Choose whether the document stores a transparent background or a solid paper tone.

background_color.name: Background Color
background_color.tooltip: Paper color used when the background mode is solid.

flatten_background.name: Flatten Background
flatten_background.tooltip: Bake the paper or background image into the IMAGE output.

document.name: Document
document.tooltip: Optional incoming PENCIL_DOCUMENT to continue editing an existing document payload.

background_image.name: Background Image
background_image.tooltip: Optional image used as a background during rendering.

clip.name: Clip
clip.tooltip: Optional CLIP encoder used to turn the split prompt into CONDITIONING.

0.name: Document
0.tooltip: Workflow document payload for downstream ComfyPencil nodes.

1.name: Image
1.tooltip: Current composite image from the studio.

2.name: Mask
2.tooltip: Alpha mask of the painted content.

3.name: Height
3.tooltip: Derived height map from painted material data.

4.name: Roughness
4.tooltip: Derived roughness map from painted material data.

5.name: Specular
5.tooltip: Derived specular map from painted material data.

6.name: Light
6.tooltip: Derived light or emissive support map from painted material data.

7.name: Metadata JSON
7.tooltip: Summary JSON for the current document state.

8.name: Conditioning
8.tooltip: Conditioning encoded from the split prompt when a CLIP input is connected.

ComfyPencilImportLayer.description: Push an upstream IMAGE or MASK into a ComfyPencil document as a new layer.

image.name: Image
image.tooltip: Upstream image to import as a layer.

mask.name: Mask
mask.tooltip: Optional alpha mask used when constructing the imported layer.

layer_name.name: Layer Name
layer_name.tooltip: Name assigned to the imported layer.

blend_mode.name: Blend Mode
blend_mode.tooltip: Blend mode stored on the imported layer.

visible.name: Visible
visible.tooltip: Whether the imported layer starts visible.

placement.name: Placement
placement.tooltip: Insert the imported layer at the top or bottom of the stack.

resize_mode.name: Resize Mode
resize_mode.tooltip: How the incoming image is fit to the document size.

persist_to_source.name: Persist To Source
persist_to_source.tooltip: When enabled, save the imported layer back into the stored source document.

flatten_background.name: Flatten Background
flatten_background.tooltip: Bake the paper tone into the rendered image output from this node.

1.name: Image
1.tooltip: Rendered document image after the import.

2.name: Mask
2.tooltip: Rendered document alpha after the import.

ComfyPencilRenderDocument.description: Render a PENCIL_DOCUMENT into image, alpha, and material support maps.

flatten_background.name: Flatten Background
flatten_background.tooltip: Bake the paper tone into the image output instead of leaving transparency.

background_image.name: Background Image
background_image.tooltip: Optional image used as a background during rendering.

5.name: Light
5.tooltip: Derived light or emissive support map.

ComfyPencilExtractLayer.description: Extract a single layer from a PENCIL_DOCUMENT by name or index.

layer_name.name: Layer Name
layer_name.tooltip: Exact layer name to extract. Takes priority over layer index when set.

layer_index.name: Layer Index
layer_index.tooltip: Layer index to extract. Use -1 for the active layer.

ComfyPencilReceivePreview.description: Store a downstream IMAGE as the split-view preview artboard for a studio document.

document.name: Document
document.tooltip: Studio document payload used to resolve the split-preview target.

image.name: Image
image.tooltip: Processed downstream image to show back inside the studio split preview.

resize_mode.name: Resize Mode
resize_mode.tooltip: How the incoming image is fit into the document dimensions before storage.
